title: 100pcs 125mm Sanding Discs, (Hook and Loop 20 x 40/60/80/120/180 Mixed Grit), 8 Hole 5 Inch Round Sanding Discs Pads for Random Orbital Sander by AniSqui
features: Multiple Grits Sanding Discs ----- 100pcs per box, 5 different grits sandpaper assortment, 20x40/60/80/120/180 125mm Diameter hook and loop Sanding Discs, to provide you with more choices when needed. 8 holes is designed for efficient dust extraction.
Good Material and Easy to Use ----- High-quality alumina sanding discs pads, durable and antistatic. Easy to install and remove, strong and long lasting, not fall off when installed in use.
Compatible ----- Suitable for Bosch PEX 220 A, PEX 300 AE, Makita DBO180Z, Makita BO5041, BO5031, DeWalt DWE6423 and so on.

Widely Used ----- Mainly used in wood, rubber, leather, plastic materials grinding, polishing and so on, metal and non-metal materials of various complex profiles for rust removal, paint stripping, deburring, soldering point grinding.
Good Service ----- If you are not satisfied with our products? We will provides 6-month warranty covers any quality related issue and 24 hours customer service.
description: From the brand Previous page Precision and perfection are at the core of AniSqui 's sandpaper range. For artisans, craftsmen, and DIY enthusiasts, our sandpapers are more than just tools; they are partners in the journey of creation. Whether it's smoothing the edges of a wooden sculpture or bringing out the shine in a metal masterpiece, our sandpapers ensure that every surface is polished to perfection. Why choose us? At AniSqui, we provide high-quality hardware tools that are durable, reliable, and designed for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts. Our tools meet the highest standards for performance. What about our after-sales service? We offer excellent after-sales support, with easy returns, quick replacements, and responsive customer assistance to ensure a trouble-free experience. What is our mission? AniSqui's mission is to deliver premium hardware tools and outstanding service, making every purchase dependable, efficient, and hassle-free for all our customers. Next page
